mapper.select: SELECT id, post_id, thumbnail_url, preview_url, raw_url, type, width, height, size, alt, format, is_animated, sort, created_at FROM post_media WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY sort ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO post_media (post_id, thumbnail_url, preview_url, raw_url, type, width, height, size, alt, format, is_animated, sort, created_at) VALUES
(#{media.postId}, #{media.thumbnailUrl}, #{media.previewUrl}, #{media.rawUrl}, #{media.type}, #{media.width}, #{media.height}, #{media.size}, #{media.alt}, #{media.format}, #{media.isAnimated}, #{media.sort}, NOW())
